name: familybridge
description: Connecting seniors with their families through ultra-simple, secure, and accessible technology

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:senior-app" "npm run dev:family-panel" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:senior-app && npm run build:family-panel && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:senior-app && npm run test:family-panel && npm run test:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:senior-app && npm run lint:family-panel && npm run lint:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd senior-app && npm install && cd ../family-panel && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt

author: Tucomullen
